title: artemisia mongolica var. leucophylla
intro: Artemisia mongolica var. leucophylla, also known as Mongolian wormwood, is a variety of the Artemisia mongolica plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to China and Mongolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia mongolica var. leucophylla include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and combating against certain parasites. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
